title: Crispy Sweet Arabian Fennel Fritters
description: Sweet, aromatic fennel fritters with a hint of cardamom and cinnamon, crisped to perfection and glutenfree.

ingredients.name: Fennel bulb
ingredients.amount: 1 medium (≈200 g), trimmed and thinly sliced

ingredients.name: Flaxseed meal
ingredients.notes: Mixed with 2.5 Tbsp water to form a flax‑egg

instructions: In a bowl, whisk together the flaxseed meal and water; let sit for 5 minutes until thick.
In a separate large bowl, combine chickpea flour, gluten‑free breadcrumbs, cardamom, cinnamon, sugar, and salt.
Add the sliced fennel to the dry mixture and toss until the fennel is evenly coated.
Gently fold in the thickened flaxseed mixture, stirring until a batter forms that can hold the fennel pieces.
Heat the vegetable oil in a non‑stick skillet over medium heat until shimmering (about 180 °C).
Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the hot oil, flattening slightly; fry for 2‑3 minutes per side until golden brown and crisp.
Transfer the fritters to a paper‑towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve warm, optionally dusted with additional sugar or a drizzle of honey for extra sweetness.
